headline: 3 Reasons CPB is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Campbell’s stock price has taken a beating over the past six months, shedding 35.1% of its value and falling to $20.31 per share. This was partly driven by its softer quarterly results and might have investors contemplating their next move.
